recommendations.title: Ode to Joy
recommendations.overview: Charlie suffers from a serious disease that causes acute narcolepsy whenever he is happy. Although he develops a variety of techniques to deny himself pleasure and deal with his sleep issues, they’re put to the test when he falls in love.

recommendations.title: Alice Doesn't Live Here Anymore

recommendations.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
recommendations.overview: A widowed professor living in Paris develops a special relationship with a younger French woman.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney & The Sack Lunch Bunch
recommendations.overview: John Mulaney and his kid pals tackle existential topics for all ages with catchy songs, comedy sketches and special guests in a nostalgic variety special.

recommendations.title: EVA
recommendations.overview: In 2041, humans live side-by-side with robots and androids. A well-known cybernetic engineer, Alex Garel, returns to his hometown to create a new model of robot child.

recommendations.title: Gattaca

recommendations.title: Don Jon
recommendations.overview: A New Jersey guy dedicated to his family, friends, and church, develops unrealistic expectations from watching porn and works to find happiness and intimacy with his potential true love.
